theory.hypothesis: Reina can master the three silent letter spelling words (sign, know, write) and recognize the three high-frequency words (among, building, circle) by the May 29 test date with targeted baseline measurement, one reinforcement cycle, and transfer proof via generated quest.
evidenceSummary: Teacher-labeled groups distinguish Silent Letters (spelling production target) from High-Frequency Words (recognition target)
No recent evidence exists for these specific targets in Reina's chart
Urgent intensity context: 2 days until test, 3 expected sessions remaining
Grade 2 silent letter patterns (kn, gn, wr) are canonical spelling curriculum targets
High-frequency words in grade 2 are typically sight-read rather than spelled from scratch
theory.intervention: Session 1: Baseline the silent letter spelling group with partial visual recall (Word Radar) to scope any pattern gaps, then probe spelling construction with audio prompt (Spell Check). Baseline high-frequency recognition with visible read (Word Radar) to confirm fluency. Insert Mystery for preference evidence and dopamine recovery. Lock Quest for silent letter transfer and Boss for final mastery gate until baseline evidence confirms readiness.
supportCriteria: Silent letter words are recalled and spelled correctly with letter tiles and audio prompt in baseline nodes
High-frequency words are read aloud fluently with STT match on first presentation
Mystery activity completes with positive engagement
Baseline evidence is strong enough to unlock Quest by session 2
reviseCriteria: One or two silent letter words require retry or show silent consonant uncertainty; increase dosage in session 2
One high-frequency word mispronounced or hesitant; add pronunciation node in session 2
Mystery skipped or neutral; adjust reward type or reduce work density
Quest unlock delayed because baseline shows more gaps than expected; add targeted reteach before transfer
falsifyCriteria: Multiple silent letter words misspelled after retry in both Word Radar and Spell Check; pattern is not accessible yet and needs explicit teaching
Two or more high-frequency words mis-read or skipped; recognition is not automatic and may require spelling work after all
Child shows frustration or refusal during baseline nodes; stamina or motivation hypothesis was wrong
Baseline evidence insufficient to unlock Quest by session 3, leaving no time for mastery gate before test

plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: All three words recalled with letter tiles in under two attempts each, no hesitation on silent consonants
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: One or two words require retry or companion hint; silent letter position shows uncertainty
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Multiple misses, skips, or frustrated abandonment; child cannot build words even with length cues

plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: All three words read aloud fluently on first presentation with STT match and no hesitation
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: One word mispronounced or hesitant; child can self-correct with replay
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Two or more words skipped, mis-read, or require heavy model-answer support

plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: All three words spelled correctly from audio prompt on first or second attempt with captured typing or voice
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: One or two words require retry; silent letter is the error locus
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Multiple words misspelled after retry, or child refuses audio-only prompt

plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: Child completes mystery activity, shows positive engagement, chooses to continue
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: Child completes but shows neutral affect or requests different activity
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Child skips mystery or abandons mid-activity; frustration or disengagement observed

plannedMeasurements.evidenceType: generated transfer artifact with per-target results
plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: All silent letter words used correctly in generated story, puzzle, or sentence context with independent spelling
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: One silent letter word misspelled or requires hint within the quest artifact
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Two or more silent letter words fail, or quest shows baseline skill was not solid

plannedMeasurements.supportCriteria: All six words demonstrate independent mastery in boss context; per-target results confirm accuracy
plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: One or two words require support or show partial mastery; boss unlocks revision loop
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: Three or more words fail in boss context; theory was falsified and requires targeted reteach
